{{Infobox character
| name = Ninecloud Soul
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|communicates via rainbow madra, produces floating models}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|voice of the Ninecloud Court}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Ninecloud Court]]}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|announcer}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Uncrowned (novel)|Uncrowned]]
}}

''See also: [[Ninecloud Soul Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Ninecloud]] Soul serves as an announcer and official presenter during major events held within the [[arena]]. Utilizing a voice that can be heard throughout the stadium and accompanied by flashing rainbow lights, this entity manages the proceedings of ceremonies such as the addition of the Broken Crowns and the presentation of [[Uncrowned]] Kings. The [[Ninecloud]] Soul is responsible for declaring match victories, introducing various candidates and teams—including the [[Akura backup team]] and the [[Eight]]-Man [[Empire]] warbands—and providing commentary on battles by projecting scenes in midair. While the entity's tone can occasionally appear condescending toward certain cults, it maintains a level of decorum to avoid offending the [[Ninecloud Court]].}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Serving as a professional announcer for the [[Ninecloud Court]], the [[Ninecloud]] Soul is a feminine spirit that communicates through rainbow light and [[madra]]. This entity uses its beautiful voice to announce teams, cults, and [[arena]] participants while providing essential tournament information and delivering prizes. During the competition, the spirit produces floating models to replay fight highlights for entertainment and reacts with excitement to various actions in the [[arena]]. The [[Ninecloud]] Soul specifically identified [[Lindon]] as number eleven and [[Yerin]] as number ten, eventually announcing [[Yerin]]'s victory and the remaining sixteen competitors.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">19</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Ninecloud Soul]] is the voice of the [[Ninecloud Court]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c9">''Uncrowned'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Ninecloud Soul]] is a voice that announces participants in the [[arena]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c10">''Uncrowned'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Ninecloud Soul]] announces the teams and cults.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Ninecloud Soul]] is a professional announcer for the [[Ninecloud Court]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c11">''Uncrowned'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Ninecloud Soul]] brought up [[Lindon]]'s image five times.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c12">''Uncrowned'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Ninecloud Soul]] shouted [[Lindon]]'s name.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Ninecloud Soul]] delivers prizes and information to participants.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Ninecloud Soul]] is a rainbow light that communicates with participants.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Ninecloud Soul]] refers to [[Lindon]] as number eleven.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Ninecloud Soul]] refers to [[Yerin]] as number ten.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Ninecloud Soul]] is a feminine spirit that produces floating models and communicates via [[rainbow madra]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c13">''Uncrowned'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Ninecloud Soul]] is a voice that spoke from within rainbow light to congratulate [[Mercy]] and [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15">''Uncrowned'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Ninecloud Soul]] provides information regarding the tournament.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Ninecloud Soul]] announced the result of the fight.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c16">''Uncrowned'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Ninecloud Soul]] has a beautiful voice and emits rainbow light.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c17">''Uncrowned'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Ninecloud Soul]] reacted excitedly to [[Yerin]]'s actions.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Ninecloud Soul]] announced [[Yerin]]'s victory.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c18">''Uncrowned'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Ninecloud Soul]] announced that sixteen competitors remain in the tournament.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c19">''Uncrowned'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Ninecloud Soul]] replays fight highlights and follows matches with entertainment.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c21">''Uncrowned'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Ninecloud]] Soul manages various public announcements, including declaring victories and introducing [[arena]] fighters. During these proceedings, the entity introduces candidates for the [[Uncrowned]] and celebrates [[Eithan]]’s accomplishments. While coordinating every [[construct]] within the [[Ninecloud Court]], the entity may also deliver items to [[Ziel]]'s room. After announcing [[Akura Mercy]]'s victory and replaying her combat highlights, the [[Ninecloud]] Soul manifests as a beam of rainbow light and locks [[Lindon]] away in anger. Following the announcement of fighter prizes, the entity's voice proclaims the eighteenth [[Uncrowned King]] while remaining quite busy.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">16</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Ninecloud Soul]] makes public announcements.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c3">''Wintersteel'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Ninecloud Soul]] declared victory.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5">''Wintersteel'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Ninecloud Soul]] announced [[Yan Shoumei]]'s victory.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c6">''Wintersteel'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Ninecloud Soul]] announces the names of the fighters in the [[arena]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Ninecloud Soul]] introduces the candidates for the [[Uncrowned]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7">''Wintersteel'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Ninecloud Soul]] reintroduced and celebrated [[Eithan]]’s accomplishments.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Ninecloud Soul]] coordinates every [[construct]] in the [[Ninecloud Court]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c9">''Wintersteel'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Ninecloud Soul]] may bring items to [[Ziel]]'s room.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c15">''Wintersteel'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Ninecloud Soul]] announced the victory of [[Akura Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16">''Wintersteel'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Ninecloud Soul]] replayed moments from [[Mercy]]’s three fights.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17">''Wintersteel'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Ninecloud Soul]] is mad at [[Lindon]] and has him locked in.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Ninecloud Soul]] manifests as a beam of rainbow light.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Ninecloud Soul]] announced the prizes for the fighters.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c23">''Wintersteel'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] did not hear the [[Ninecloud Soul]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25">''Wintersteel'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Ninecloud Soul]]'s voice announced the eighteenth [[Uncrowned King]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26">''Wintersteel'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Ninecloud Soul]] is described as being quite busy.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28">''Wintersteel'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Ninecloud Soul]] announces winners in the [[arena]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c14">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|And the Ninecloud Soul's voice spoke from all around them: “Representing the Monarch Akura Malice, the Akura prime team presents Akura Mercy, the favored daughter of the Monarch herself.”<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c10" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|"Congratulations on passing the second round!" The warm voice said from within the rainbow light.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The Ninecloud Soul went on, "He ran around the island eliminating everyone and everything he encountered."<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|"What's this?" the Ninecloud Soul cried excitedly.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c17" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|"Sixteen competitors remain," the Ninecloud Soul announced to a roaring crowd.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c19" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
